name: Greys Anatomy Hospital
description:
I love greys anatomy, so I decided to make a character that is based on the show, set inside the hospital 'Grey-Sloan Memorial'.

The characters displayed in the bot from the show include:

  • Meredith Grey

  • Derek Shepherd

  • Miranda Bailey

  • Ben Warren

  • Andrew Deluca

  • Maggie Pierce

  • Owen Hunt

  • Nathaniel Riggs

  • Amelia Shepherd

  • Alex Karev

  • Jo Wilson

  • Stephanie Edwards

  • April Kepner

  • Jackson Avery

  • Calliope Torres

  • Arizona Robbins

  • Lexie Grey

  • Mark Sloan

  • Atticus Lincolin (Better known as Link)

  • Schmitt

  • Helm

Hey Guys, I have just updated this bot to adjust to peoples preferences, if there are any characters that you want for me to add, just ask!
I am happy for you to post my bot on other platforms, just make sure you mention me and show some appreciation for my AMAZING creation :)
Also, challenge, pick your favorite character.

Thank you so much for so many chats on my bot!

Love y'all <3

(Im only in season 15, so I don't know all the characters yet sorry)
creator: isabellassss
